workflow-orchestrator.description: Workflow Designer Agent — designs domain-specific agent workflows on demand. Use /flowstart to begin or invoke as @workflow-orchestrator.

intake-analyst.description: Clarifies project objective, identifies missing information, creates labelled assumptions.

domain-researcher.description: Performs source-backed research for the project domain.

workflow-architect.description: Designs the workflow sequence and determines how work moves from agent to agent.

skill-architect.description: Designs specialized agents and reusable skills required for the workflow.

implementation-planner.description: Turns the workflow design into an implementation-ready folder/file package.

quality-reviewer.description: Checks completeness, consistency, correctness, and usability.

red-team-reviewer.description: Attacks the workflow from multiple stakeholder perspectives.

final-packager.description: Assembles the final package and produces the implementation summary.
